reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.11: brush strokes on the main canvas are about twice as fast again, and the raster paint window gains a Layer menu (New Layer, Move Up/Down, Delete). Each raster stroke used to allocate and encode a full transparent canvas via render_cropped_stroke (~58 ms) on top of the final encode. The stroke is now drawn directly onto the live layer bitmap via a shared image-based core, cutting per-stroke work from about 163 ms to 78 ms on a 2048 canvas, verified pixel-identical to before.
